escalatedRisks.risk: Goldman Sachs global NAND 4.2% deficit (largest since 2011)
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED вАФ Day 2. Highest-level independent NAND supply quantification.
escalatedRisks.detail: Global NAND flash deficit of 4.2% forecast for 2026 вАФ largest since 2011. NAND Q2 contract +70-75% QoQ (largest quarterly increase in a decade). Enterprise SSD 53.8% of market. Combined with full-chain sold-out, Kioxia 2026 sold out, Samsung warm-down production cut, and MLC NAND tripled.
